description: An accountant needs to perform the monthly bank reconciliation, matching transactions in the general ledger to the bank statement.

nodes.task_description: Import the monthly bank statement into the accounting software.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully imports the bank transaction data.

nodes.task_description: Run the automated matching process to reconcile transactions.

expected_outcome.value: The system automatically matches 95% of the transactions.

nodes.task_description: Identify and investigate any outstanding, unmatched items.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies three unmatched items that require manual investigation (e.g., a bank fee, an unrecorded debit).
